steps.t: Faeron and Rhadrog are stationed in the Stargazer's Spire in Minas Morgul. You should report to Faeron.
Rhadrog can be found in the Stargazer's Spire. You should talk to Rhadrog.
You have defeated Dolguzigir, and been granted an opportunity to take one tome from the Halls of Black Lore. You should ask Dolguzigir for the Great P…
You have completed your mission and acquired the plague recipe. You should talk to Faeron.
